headline: Google employees call for military limits on AI amid Iran strikes, Anthropic fallout
summary: Employees at Alphabet and OpenAI are pushing for stricter limits on the military's use of AI, as tensions rise following the blacklisting of Anthropic's models.

headline: A Look At Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Valuation After Rapid TFDM Rollout And Reaffirmed Growth Outlook
summary: Why the latest airport tech rollout matters for Leidos Leidos Holdings (LDOS) has rolled out its Terminal Flight Data Manager system at Reagan National Airport significantly faster than the usual implementation cycle, highlighting execution on mission programs tied to U.S. airspace modernization efforts. For you as a shareholder or watcher of the stock, this rapid deployment sits alongside recent earnings, guidance and capital decisions. It provides a fresh data point on how the company is...

headline: Leidos TFDM Milestone At Reagan And What It May Mean For LDOS
summary: Leidos Holdings accelerated deployment of its Terminal Flight Data Manager system at Reagan National Airport, completing the rollout ahead of schedule. The TFDM system replaces paper based tracking with digital, predictive tools designed to improve coordination of arrivals, departures, and surface operations. This implementation is part of a broader push to modernize U.S. airspace infrastructure at multiple airports. For investors watching NYSE:LDOS, this latest TFDM milestone provides...
